title: Notification, Broadcast & WebSocket Push

classes.name: BaseService
classes.notes: Parent of all services; provides service locator via this.services.get(name)

classes.name: EventService
methods: emit(key: string, data: any, meta?: object): Promise<void>
classes.notes: Central event bus. emit() dispatches to wildcard-matched listeners (e.g. 'outer.*' catches 'outer.gui.item.added'). Supports hierarchical wildcard matching via dot-split.

classes.name: ScopedEventBus
classes.notes: Proxy wrapping EventService; prepends scope prefix to all keys

classes.name: BroadcastService
classes.notes: Listens on EventService 'outer.*'; deduplicates+batches outbound webhook calls to peer nodes; publishes/subscribes via Redis pubsub for cluster-wide delivery; exposes POST /broadcast/webhook with HMAC-SHA256 + nonce + timestamp replay protection

classes.name: WSPushService
classes.notes: Bridges fs/exec events → outer.gui.* events → SocketIO rooms. _on_outer_gui is the final delivery step: iterates user_id_list, calls svc_socketio.send({room: user_id}, key, response), then emits sent-to-user.{key} back on EventService. Also updates KV store timestamp per user.

classes.name: NotificationService
classes.notes: notify() generates UUID, emits outer.gui.notif.message to EventService, then async-inserts to DB and emits outer.gui.notif.persisted. do_on_user_connected() queries unseen notifications from DB and emits outer.gui.notif.unreads. Routes: POST /notif/mark-ack, POST /notif/mark-read.

relationships: BroadcastService depends_on EventService (subscribes 'outer.*', emits via svcEvent.emit)
WSPushService depends_on EventService (subscribes fs.*, outer.gui.*, puter-exec.*)
NotificationService depends_on EventService (subscribes web.socket.user-connected, sent-to-user.notif.message; emits outer.gui.notif.*)
event_flow: EventService 'web.socket.user-connected' → NotificationService.on_user_connected() → do_on_user_connected() → DB SELECT + emit 'outer.gui.notif.unreads'
EventService 'outer.*' → BroadcastService.outBroadcastEventHandler() → Redis publish + webhook batch queue
BroadcastService #flushOutboundEvents() → HTTP POST /broadcast/webhook to peers (HMAC signed)
BroadcastService POST /broadcast/webhook received → HMAC verify → Redis publish + EventService.emit
important_notes: All four services extend BaseService and wire up via this.services.get(name) service locator
EventService supports wildcard matching: 'outer.*' listener receives all 'outer.X.Y.Z' events
BroadcastService deduplicates events via JSON-keyed Map and batches flushes every ~5s to reduce webhook spam
BroadcastService uses Redis pubsub to synchronize events within the same cluster (avoids re-broadcasting own events via sourceId check)
WSPushService is the single fan-out point to SocketIO: all GUI push goes through svc_socketio.send({room: user_id})
NotificationService uses TeePromise to coordinate between async DB write and on_sent_to_user callback
POST /broadcast/webhook protected by: peer-id header, HMAC-SHA256 signature, timestamp window (±300s), monotonic nonce
